textByHash.d899e3020d239604632ea42774f2f75702f164a6: You're right, I did not come here by choice. I came here for vengeance.
textByHash.952f8d5dc759fa713a7b2d307aad264e160d631c: My mission is not against another man and I will not have it mocked.
textByHash.e8bac220c0c473f7273901ab8983976ac81b00b1: Callisto, the great bear of the wilderness.
textByHash.328bc89c8a0c08c69e394be1bcc1d7878524514a: I'm not surprised, you'd do well to avoid him. Callisto is a great bear, his strength and size enhanced by the corruption of the Wilderness.
textByHash.95ec9c91f6f43d50d8d690d841bd5089efb7ecfd: Then you'll know he's not something to mock. I'm surprised you survived your encounter with such a great and corrupted beast.
textByHash.1e60f50f44a9f758e7bb32b1b0a017f445a0c33e: Callisto killed my father. After hearing of a great beast in the heart of the Wilderness, he took it upon himself to bring him down.
textByHash.8970d37686faa55b099c90fae168f1da852ab529: He left our family home in Hosidius to hunt it down and...
textByHash.e57a2b708e393a9200e37fc1066d1f8ffb5da658: ... I haven't seen my father since. I swore I would avenge him and have dedicated my whole life to training for that moment.
textByHash.d79cd40fd2d43ebd15ea2d829996e9230f0ae18d: Oh... uh... I never thought about that...
textByHash.95b5b6ba4da56eed8e222e5fa993859ce97222a8: My whole life has been spent preparing to avenge my father, I never thought about anything else...
textByHash.a761bd76ad545df32f2df6fb6868bb8c37cdde64: Ah, a fellow marksman. That's a unique bow you have there.
textByHash.9b56e74bc9c8b8ca3b1bd680008fbfec3bd976fb: I've done my fair bit of fletching in my day. I'd say this bow can be improved upon.
textByHash.6d06ba96f4b4662491d62b5653335145b14f384f: See those etches on it? You could put something sharp in there to improve the bow's strength.
textByHash.b30f98cf2a7271b49853dd6ad430518ba71a4c79: Those look like strong fangs. You could probably attach them to a bow to make it stronger.
textByHash.b381d473b02619722b9528fc7939986b8759ef93: Yes. Those look like they could be attached to the weapon.
textByHash.fc8053591c960224dac893b65a323aca72911372: Sure I can. For the right price.
textByHash.b72ad81f5b04411db693423b39583f5327d83927: Feel free to come back when you do.
textByHash.71586411730e927c5814b1512ec8a424315b181d: By the gods... This bear must be even bigger than I imagined.
textByHash.a6998c9ee3e9791f3027090000c22c208c93d6e0: I... have a lot to think about. Perhaps Andros Mai over there can help you while I think.
textByHash.fcc1cd8c6aed16c3cbd2742a037cbbd41338eddd: That looks like any skull to me. Who's is it?
textByHash.6e9ba79804a38f1ee1bb3461f3862d9e578784e6: I meant... Sigh. Never mind. What do you want with the skull?
textByHash.68827700eaac6dd32d340262243320d1e177531b: Don't know much about skulls, myself. That mage over there might know.
textByHash.54b8ab4a6d99fbe5c04f9313fedf4f42458c6274: She's into some weird stuff, that one. Think she said her name was Phabelle Bile.
textByHash.95744a8c4cb2fab2876c70ebd01ef42f8e1efeaf: Just earlier I saw this lady run down into the basement of this pub.
textByHash.1d2b9f98a7c56b3f4c595bea4feee843dbd739af: I don't know who she is, but she looks like a strange one.
textByHash.96d343e19a86a4d531f8b512c3f6db60b0c9c8d0: Strange attracts strange, so I reckon she might know about your strange weapon piece.
